data.body: PROMPT ENGINEERING over criteria prompts (research-grounded via 2 web-research subagents). PERSONA QUESTION answered + pushed back: per-criterion role/company priming (Principal SWE at Google etc.) is NOT a rigor lever — Zheng 2024 EMNLP (162 roles, no gain), Prompt Report (MMLU 71.6->66.3 as persona lengthens), 'Persona Double-edged Sword' (degrades reasoning); personas help tone not correctness, risk confident-but-wrong. DID NOT add personas; evidence-backed substitute = standard-anchoring (already present). APPLIED high-value levers: (1) REASON-FIRST — 'Let Me Speak Freely' Tam 2024 (forcing tool/JSON first: Claude-Haiku 86.5->23.4%); added leading required  field to submit_review/emit_findings/verify_finding so model reasons before verdict (we were force-calling the tool immediately — the exact anti-pattern). (2) affirmative anti-FP framing (pink-elephant). (3) verbosity-bias guard. Already-doing (validated): atomic checklists (TICK/CheckEval), independent verify (CoVe/SAFE), calibrated abstention. PROPOSED for production/eval-seam: self-consistency N-sampling, few-shot calibration exemplars per facet, calibrate-to-humans. Cargo-cult avoided: emotional/'take a deep breath' prompts. Full do/don't + citations documented in epic 6f2d WS-DOC (check-ac 12, clarity 7). Committed harness changes.
